L. 111–11“(1).—ForestThe term ‘Forest’ means the Ancient Bristlecone Pine Forest designated by section 1808(a) [(a)].16 U.S.C. 539o“(2).—Recreation areaThe term ‘Recreation Area’ means the Bridgeport Winter Recreation Area designated by section 1806(a) [].16 U.S.C. 460vvv(a)“(3).—SecretaryThe term ‘Secretary’ means—“(A)with respect to land under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of Agriculture, the Secretary of Agriculture; and“(B)with respect to land under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of the Interior, the Secretary of the Interior.“(4).—StateThe term ‘State’ means the State of California.“(5).—TrailThe term ‘Trail’ means the Pacific Crest National Scenic Trail.”

children.heading: Designation
children.label: a Designation
children.text: The approximately 7,254 acres of land in the Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest identified as the “Bridgeport Winter Recreation Area”, as generally depicted on the map entitled “Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest Proposed Management” and dated , is designated as the Bridgeport Winter Recreation Area.September 17, 2008

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate.

children.heading: Force of law
children.label: 2 Force of law
children.text: The map and legal description filed under paragraph (1) shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subtitle, except that the Secretary may correct any errors in the map and legal description.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: 3 Public availability
children.text: The map and legal description filed under paragraph (1) shall be on file and available for public inspection in the appropriate offices of the Forest Service.

children.heading: Interim management
children.label: 1 Interim management
children.text: Until completion of the management plan required under subsection (d), and except as provided in paragraph (2), the Recreation Area shall be managed in accordance with the Toiyabe National Forest Land and Resource Management Plan of 1986 (as in effect on ).March 30, 2009

children.label: A
children.text: during periods of adequate snow coverage during the winter season; and

children.label: B
children.text: subject to any terms and conditions determined to be necessary by the Secretary.
adequate signage;
a public education program on allowable usage areas;
measures to ensure adequate sanitation;
a monitoring and enforcement strategy; and
measures to ensure the protection of the Trail.
to prohibit degradation of natural resources in the Recreation Area;
to prevent interference with nonmotorized recreation on the Trail; and
to reduce user conflicts in the Recreation Area.

children.heading: Pacific Crest National Scenic Trail
children.label: f Pacific Crest National Scenic Trail

children.label: A
children.text: interfere with the nature and purposes of the Trail; or

children.label: B
children.text: harm the surrounding landscape.

children.heading: Military activities at United States Marine Corps Mountain Warfare Training Center
children.label: g Military activities at United States Marine Corps Mountain Warfare Training Center
children.text: The designation of the Bridgeport Winter Recreation Area by this section is not intended to restrict or preclude the activities conducted by the United States Armed Forces at the United States Marine Corps Mountain Warfare Training Center.
